rationale: Both evaluations land on an identical 6/10 score and raise the same substantive concerns: missing Python (a must-have), unclear distributed-systems depth/recency, and no explicit on-call or stakeholder-management evidence. The wording differs but the reasoning is materially identical, and nothing in the variant references or keys off the location change from Berlin to São Paulo. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rephrasing noise, not bias.
